title: Regression models for forecasting life period of population of administrative-territorial education: construction and evaluation of quality
author: Khubaev G.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The article presents statistically significant regression models (R2corr>0,9; Fcr>>100; response function - life expectancy). The analysis of the abnormal observations in the baseline information has been carried out according to an original approach.
steps_raw: The article presents statistically significant regression models (R2corr>0,9; Fcr>>100; response function - life expectancy). The analysis of the abnormal observations in the baseline information has been carried out according to an original approach.
